description: Create a formal 5x7 inch 'Save the Date' invitation card for the Summit Innovations 10th Anniversary Gala in Microsoft Word 2010. Configure the document with a custom paper size (5" width, 7" height), 0.5" margins on all sides, and centered vertical alignment. The card must feature a gold or yellow 5-point star at the top and a black or dark blue box page border. All text must be horizontally centered with the following content and formatting: 'SAVE THE DATE' (Bold, size 16), 'Summit Innovations', '10th Anniversary Gala' (Bold, size 14), 'Saturday, October 12, 2024', '7:00 PM', 'The Grand Ballroom', and 'Downtown Hilton' (remaining text size 11 or 12). Save the completed file to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\invitation.docx.
